title: Parliament Budget Session LIVE: Petrol and diesel prices has remain same, says Nirmala Sitharaman
description: P.K. Mody, Secretary-General, says the Lok Sabha adopted the motion that the Rajya Sabha do extend time for presentation of the report of the joint committee on the Constitution 130th Amendment Bill, 2025, the Jammu and Kashmir reorganisation Bill, 2025, the Government of Union Territories Amendment Bill, 2025; Lok Sabha takes up Matters of public importance
